revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:青木神社]]
'''Aoki Shrine''' (青木神社, Aoki Jinja) * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Sakae, Yokohama)|ja|青木神社 (横浜市栄区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Sakae, Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503348|1=Aoki Shrine (Sakae, Yokohama)}} - Located in [[Sakae Ward]], {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Kōnan, Yokohama)|ja|青木神社 (横浜市港南区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Kōnan, Yokohama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503351|1=Aoki Shrine (Kōnan, Yokohama)}} - Located in [[Kōnan Ward]], Yokohama, Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Okutama)|ja|青木神社 (奥多摩町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Okutama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503352|1=Aoki Shrine (Okutama)}} - Located in [[Okutama Town]], {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|qid=Q1490|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo}}. * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja|青木神社 (静岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Shizuoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503355|1=Aoki Shrine (Shizuoka)}} - Located in [[:en:Aoi Ward|Aoi Ward]], [[:en:Shizuoka City|Shizuoka City]], {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Yaizu, Honmachi)|ja|青木神社 (焼津市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Yaizu, Honmachi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503357|1=Aoki Shrine (Yaizu, Honmachi)}} - Located in Honmachi, [[Yaizu City]], Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Yaizu, Hamatome)|ja|青木神社 (焼津市浜当目)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Yaizu, Hamatome)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503358|1=Aoki Shrine (Yaizu, Hamatome)}} - Located in Hamatome, Yaizu City, Shizuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|青木神社 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Okazaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503360|1=Aoki Shrine (Okazaki)}} - Located in [[:en:Okazaki City|Okazaki City]], {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Kani)|ja|青木神社 (可児市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Kani)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503362|1=Aoki Shrine (Kani)}} - Located in [[Kani City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Aoki Shrine (Itano)|ja|青木神社 (板野町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine (Itano)|qq=}} - Located in [[Itano Town]], [[:en:Itano District|Itano District]], {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. {{disambiguation}}
{{disambiguation}}
